
---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve Tourderwang
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment Information
- **Device**: [e.g. iPhone 12, Desktop]
- **OS**: [e.g. iOS 15.0, Windows 11, macOS 12.0]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 95, Safari 15, Firefox 94]
- **App Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Screen Size**: [e.g. 1920x1080, Mobile]

## User Account Information
- **User Type**: [e.g. Customer, Restaurant Owner, Admin]
- **Authentication Method**: [e.g. Email, Google, Facebook]
- **Account Status**: [e.g. Free, Premium]

## Network Information
- **Connection Type**: [e.g. WiFi, 4G, 5G]
- **Location**: [e.g. Wang Sam Mo, Udonthani]
- **ISP**: [e.g. True, AIS, dtac] (if relevant)

## Error Details
```
Paste any error messages, stack traces, or console errors here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here, such as:
- When did this start happening?
- Does this happen every time or intermittently?
- Are there any workarounds?
- Has this worked before?

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided all requested information
- [ ] I have tested this on the latest version
- [ ] I have cleared my browser cache and cookies
- [ ] I have tried reproducing this in an incognito/private window
